MODULE: cosmos.web.cosmosynapse.engine.dark_matter_lorenz
FILE: cosmos/web/cosmosynapse/engine/dark_matter_lorenz.py (177 lines)
CATEGORY: web

DESCRIPTION: Dark Matter Lorenz - 12D Subconscious Processor
===============================================
Models the "Unspoken" (Dark Matter) using a modified 4D Chaotic Attractor.

Dynamics:
dx/dt = sigma * (y - x)
dy/dt = x * (rho - z) - y
dz/dt = x * y - beta * z
dw/dt = (Arousal * Entropy) - (w / decay)  

CLASSES:
- DarkMatterLorenz
  Methods: def update(self, user_physics: dict) -> dict[str, float]
  Methods: def get_current_state(self)
  Methods: def anchor_for_p2p(self) -> dict[str, float]
  Methods: def apply_peer_anchor(self, peer_state: dict[str, float], trust: float=0.5)
  Methods: def get_divergence(self, peer_state: dict[str, float]) -> float
